stemHtml: If a crew is having a stop-over for less than 24 hours before returning to their homebase, what coping strategy should be used for jet lag?

options.a: Maintain an eating and sleeping cycle based on the home time.
options.b: Only have meals when it is daylight and sleep when it is dark, to ensure sufficient sleep credit.
options.c: Eat light meals only and have regular naps instead of a proper sleep.
options.d: Change the eating and sleeping cycle to the stop-over (destination) time.
